name: Listmonk
description: Listmonk — Open-source self-hosted newsletter and mailing list manager with REST API and analytics.

seo.title: Listmonk — CRM / Lifecycle Automation
seo.meta_description: Listmonk: Listmonk — Open-source self-hosted newsletter and mailing list manager with REST API and analytics.

when_to_use: Self-hosted newsletter with full subscriber data ownership
REST API integration syncing signups from a product app
Transactional email and newsletter from a single open-source tool
High-volume mailing list management on self-managed infra
Open-source alternative to Mailchimp for developer-operated newsletters

pros: Self-hosted, no per-subscriber fees at scale
Single Go binary keeps ops simple
Full REST API for programmatic sending
Handles millions of subscribers on modest hardware
cons: You own deliverability, warmup, bounce handling
UI less polished than SaaS alternatives
review.verdict: Best open-source newsletter tool; saves real money at 100k+ subs if you can run infra.
review.best_for: Technical teams with 100k+ subscribers and DevOps capability

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
